card.comment: Signature dark card body on light page

body.comment: Ambient body ink. FLIPS with the theme (dark override #e0e0e0), because the ambient surfaces it sits on (--surface-page, --surface-elevated) flip with the theme too. Use this for anything that does not establish its own background.

on-fixed-light.comment: Ink for a surface that is light in EVERY theme -- brand amber (--brand-primary) is the case that exists. Deliberately has NO dark override: the surface does not change, so the ink must not either. Task-#2417.

on-light.comment: DEPRECATED (Task-#2417) -- use color.text.body. Kept only so external consumers do not break. The name is a lie: it reads as 'ink for a light surface', but --surface-card is DARK in the light theme and both are #424242, so hardcoding this on a card renders text in its own background colour (measured 1:1). It also flips in dark mode, which silently breaks any fixed-light surface -- see color.text.on-fixed-light.

neutral.comment: Task-#1970 audit — anchor for n/a / disabled / no-data status. Matches text.muted.

error-bg.comment: Task-#1970 audit — tinted alert background derived from feedback.error. Alpha keeps it mode-agnostic.

success-bg.comment: Task-#1970 audit — tinted alert background derived from feedback.success.

info-bg.comment: Task-#1970 audit — tinted alert background derived from feedback.info.

warning-bg.comment: Task-#1970 audit — tinted alert background derived from feedback.warning.

neutral-bg.comment: Task-#1970 audit — tinted background for neutral status.

error-text.comment: Task-#1970 audit — darker text for WCAG AA on tinted error-bg + light page. Dark-mode override lives at color.feedback.dark.error-text.

success-text.comment: Task-#1970 audit — darker text for WCAG AA on tinted success-bg + light page.

info-text.comment: Task-#1970 audit — darker text for WCAG AA on tinted info-bg + light page.

warning-text.comment: Task-#1970 audit — darker text for WCAG AA on tinted warning-bg + light page.

neutral-text.comment: Task-#1970 audit — darker text for WCAG AA on tinted neutral-bg + light page.

error-solid.comment: Task-#2089 — bold full-bleed error surface tuned for white body text at WCAG AA (contrast 5.62:1 vs #ffffff). Pair with color.text.on-dark.

success-solid.comment: Task-#2089 — bold full-bleed success surface tuned for white body text at WCAG AA (contrast 5.13:1 vs #ffffff). Pair with color.text.on-dark.

info-solid.comment: Task-#2089 — bold full-bleed info surface tuned for white body text at WCAG AA (contrast 6.50:1 vs #ffffff). Pair with color.text.on-dark.

warning-solid.comment: Task-#2089 — bold full-bleed warning surface tuned for white body text at WCAG AA (contrast 5.02:1 vs #ffffff). Pair with color.text.on-dark.

neutral-solid.comment: Task-#2089 — bold full-bleed neutral surface tuned for white body text at WCAG AA (contrast 8.18:1 vs #ffffff). Pair with color.text.on-dark.

base.value: Iosevka, "Iosevka Web", ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, monospace
base.comment: Iosevka-first stack — full monospace terminal aesthetic (teenage.engineering moodboard). Bundled via @font-face in src/fonts/fonts.css; system-mono fallbacks keep first paint sane during font-display: swap.
